text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega has been feeling under the weather
recently, so I decide to take her to a shrine to try
and lift her mood.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's quiet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tilts her head toward the sky. It looks as
though whatever tension she was feeling is
beginning to ease up.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The stars. Even though they're not visible in the
daytime, I know they're up there.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Wheeew! Ah, Ayabe and her trainer! What a
coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It is. Are you practicing running on the road?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yes! This is the point where the track turns back
toward the academy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
If you haven't visited the shrine yet, would you
like to go in together? I usually offer a prayer
before heading back!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll pass. I just came here for a change of scenery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I see. Well, I'm going to head to the shrine then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll pray that we'll both be in tip-top condition for
our races!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What... do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That's just the wish I want to come true! I don't
want either of us to suddenly get into an accident
or fall sick or anything!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, whether you run well or not is
completely on you though!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm off! See you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Give me a break...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Trainer, can you come with me to the shrine?
choice_data_list: Sure. But I thought you weren't up for it.
Sure. But I thought you weren't up for it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, I am now. Guess I got better.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Also... I have a favor to repay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face glows cheerfully as she speaks. With
that, we both go to pray at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Is that so... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We hear a rumbling sound in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plip... Plip, plop... FSSSHHH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Gahh! Rain?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly the sky becomes dark and the street is
awash with heavy rain. But before long, the
clouds drift away, and the sky becomes sunny
again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That was some downpour! I'm glad it was over
quickly, but now we're drenched.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sudden storm has put Admire Vega straight
back into a bad mood again.
